title: As Trump Deadline Looms, Iran and U.S. Mix Threats With Hints of Deal
summary_full: One potential off-ramp appeared when Iran offered a 10-point counterproposal for ending the war that President Trump called a significant step, if “not good enough.”
summary_public: One potential off-ramp appeared when Iran offered a 10-point counterproposal for ending the war that President Trump called a significant step, if “not good enough.”
